features: Glow & Resurface - This serum gently buffs away skins impurities leaving
Gently exfoliates and retexturises the skin to promote a more even complexion.
Packed with 3% Lactic Acid, you can apply before bed to dial up your glow whilst your skin sleeps.
description: Product Description Exfoliate & brighten your skin with our Lactic Acid Facial Serum. Packed with 3% Lactic Acid, calming Aloe Vera and Vitamin C-rich Peach extract, our resurfacing serum gently buffs away surface impurities to promote a more even complexion. Apply before bed to dial up your glow whilst your skin sleeps. Ingredients Aqua, Butylene Glycol, Lactic Acid, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Water, Betaine, PEG/PPG-17/6 Copolymer, Prunus Persica (Peach) Resin Extract, Yeast Ferment Extract, Sorbeth-30, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Sodium Hydroxide, Hydroxyacetophenone, Allantoin, PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Panthenol, Chlorphenesin, Ethylhexylglycerin, Biosaccharide Gum-1, 1,2-Hexanediol, Parfum, Disodium Phosphate, Polysorbate 60, Sodium Phosphate, Benzyl Benzoate. Directions Can be used either morning or evening. In the morning, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to the face before applying makeup. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed. In the evening, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to cleansed, dry skin. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed and leave on overnight. Shake well before use. See more
